/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 -o amplgsl.dll -install_name @rpath/amplgsl.dll CMakeFiles/amplgsl.dir/src/amplgsl.cc.o  ../../../lib/libasl.a ../libgsl.a ../libgslcblas.a ../../../lib/libasl.a -lm
